name: backalley
description: Private plugin marketplace for security tooling and custom integrations

plugins.name: gh
plugins.description: MCP server for GitHub CLI — issue pull/push/diff with comment sync and local search

plugins.name: markdown-format
plugins.description: Auto-fix common markdown formatting issues in .md files

plugins.name: process
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow — brainstorm, plan, execute, review — using GitHub Issues or local markdown files, with TDD, debugging, and verification skills

plugins.name: terminal-color-status
plugins.description: Changes terminal background color to indicate when Claude Code is ready for input
